title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Metro Cash & Carry Capital India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Metro Cash & Carry Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Metro Cash & Carry Capital India! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Metro Cash & Carry Capital India:
Metro Cash & Carry Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Cash & Carry Capital India!
